---
title: "Exercise 02 markov model"
subtitle: "With simulation-time dependence"
author: "The DARTH workgroup"
---

[Download exercise handout](../exercises/exe2-cSTM_sick-sicker_time_exercise_template.html)   

[Download lifetables](../exercises/exe2-HMD_USA_Mx.csv)   

[Download excercise template](../exercises/exe2-cSTM_sick-sicker_time_exercise_template.Rmd)
